memberdef.name: DT_CAN_TRANSCEIVER_MIN_BITRATE
memberdef.initializer: COND_CODE_1(DT_NODE_HAS_PROP(node_id, phys), \ MAX(DT_PROP_OR(DT_PHANDLE(node_id, phys), min_bitrate, 0), min), \ MAX(DT_PROP_OR(DT_CHILD(node_id, can_transceiver), min_bitrate, min), min))

briefdescription.para: Get the minimum transceiver bitrate for a CAN controller.

detaileddescription.para: The bitrate will be limited to the minimum bitrate supported by the CAN controller. If no CAN transceiver is present in the devicetree, the minimum bitrate will be that of the CAN controller.

memberdef.name: DT_CAN_TRANSCEIVER_MAX_BITRATE
memberdef.initializer: COND_CODE_1(DT_NODE_HAS_PROP(node_id, phys), \ MIN(DT_PROP(DT_PHANDLE(node_id, phys), max_bitrate), max), \ MIN(DT_PROP_OR(DT_CHILD(node_id, can_transceiver), max_bitrate, max), max))

briefdescription.para: Get the maximum transceiver bitrate for a CAN controller.

detaileddescription.para: The bitrate will be limited to the maximum bitrate supported by the CAN controller. If no CAN transceiver is present in the devicetree, the maximum bitrate will be that of the CAN controller.

briefdescription.para: Get the minimum transceiver bitrate for a DT_DRV_COMPAT CAN controller.

parameterdescription.para: minimum bitrate supported by the CAN controller

simplesect.para: the minimum bitrate supported by the CAN controller/transceiver combination

briefdescription.para: Get the maximum transceiver bitrate for a DT_DRV_COMPAT CAN controller.

parameterdescription.para: maximum bitrate supported by the CAN controller

simplesect.para: the maximum bitrate supported by the CAN controller/transceiver combination
